heading: Required Roles
body:
The following table describes the roles required to perform
various actions to a database in the Atlas UI:

| Action           | Required Roles                                                                                                        |
| ---------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Create Databases | One of the following roles:Project Owner or Organization OwnerProject Data Access AdminProject Data Access Read/Write |
| View Databases   | At least the Project Data Access Read Only role.                                                                      |
| Drop Databases   | One of the following roles:Project OwnerProject Data Access Admin                                                     |
